emergency_definition: lockout where someone's safety is at risk
break-in damage where a property is left unsecured

emergency_routing_rules.fallback: tell them to stay safe and someone will call back within 15 minutes

non_emergency_routing_rules: leave a voicemail message with name and number and we'll call back when we're available
after_hours_flow_summary: leave a voicemail message with name and number and we'll call back when we're available
notes: always get the exact location for any lockout call — address or cross streets
